offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, compliance reporting delays cause missed deadlines. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely regulatory reports for compliance.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
Direct outreach to accounting firms with demo videos
Participate in forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users experience manual data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
